rulings.Case Title: PAUL R BARNES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Defendant Walgreen Co.S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Elizabeth Barnes Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Walgreen Co.¿s motion to compel plaintiff Elizabeth Barnes' further responses For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is denied as to requests for admissions 11-12, form interrogatory 17.1 with respect to requests for admission 1-4, 11-15 and 19, special interrogatories 1-3, 5, 11, 13, 21 and granted as to special interrogatories 4, 24, 26, 27, 29, 31-34 and requests for production 1-2, 5, 7, 10-13. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiffs¿ objections to special interrogatories 2-5, 13, 21, 24, 26, 27, 29, 31-34 and requests for production 1-2, 10-13 are stricken. In accordance with their opposition papers, plaintiffs are deemed to not have any further information responsive to the requests for admissions 11-12, form interrogatory 17.1 and special interrogatories 1-3, 5, 11, 13 and 21. Anyone contesting this tentative ruling must identify which discovery requests it intends to argue about at the hearing. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO DATIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Deft Sporlan Valve Company'S Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Compel Pltf Angelo Datis' Further Deposition Testimony And Deft W.W. Grainger, Inc'S Joinder To Same
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. DEFENDANT TECUMSEH PRODUCTS COMPANY's Joinder In Defendant Sporlan Valve Company'S Motion To Compel and defendant W.W.Grainger, Inc.'s joinder of same. Defendant Sporlan Valve Company¿s motion to compel further deposition testimony from the plaintiff and all joinders thereto are granted. The first-served defendants may have up to a total of 30 hours (including time already consumed) to depose the plaintiff. Once the first-served defendants have completed their questions, the second-served defendants may have up to a total of 10 hours to depose the plaintiff. = (220/HEK)
